nodes.label: art
nodes.notes: Root semantic field: art as learned skill, practice, and making.

nodes.label: artifice
nodes.semantic_role: bridge between skilled making and contrivance
nodes.notes: Must not be reduced to deception; it carries skillful making and contrivance.

nodes.label: artificer
nodes.notes: Shows the maker figure behind the word family.

nodes.label: artificial
nodes.notes: Central node of the apparatus; should anchor the resting view.

nodes.label: artificially
nodes.semantic_role: by art / by skill / by contrivance
nodes.notes: Derived adverb; useful for preserving the action-by-skill sense.

nodes.label: artificial arguments
nodes.notes: Strong anchor for artificial as rhetorical / rule-based invention.

nodes.label: artificial numbers
nodes.notes: Strong anchor for artificial as mathematical construction.

nodes.label: artificial memory
nodes.notes: Promising learned-technique anchor; should carry a confidence qualifier.

nodes.label: artificial day
nodes.notes: Historically plausible but public-facing obscure; keep low visibility unless further verified.

nodes.label: artificial lines
nodes.notes: Confirmed enough for notes, but should not compete with stronger anchors.

nodes.label: made by art / skill
nodes.notes: Core Chart 1 sense.

nodes.label: contrivance / construction
nodes.semantic_role: devised or constructed; neutral or suspicious bridge
nodes.notes: Bridge node from skillful making toward later suspicion; not deception only.

nodes.label: not natural
nodes.semantic_role: opposed to natural, not necessarily fake
nodes.notes: Must remain visually distinct from fake / not genuine.

nodes.label: imitation / substitute
nodes.semantic_role: made to imitate or replace something natural
nodes.notes: Later branch; useful for connecting Chart 1 to later charts.

nodes.label: fake / not genuine
nodes.notes: Suspicious branch; should never appear as the root meaning.

nodes.label: affected / insincere
nodes.notes: Lower-weight affective branch; evidence is weaker than the core path.

nodes.label: semantic chamber
nodes.notes: Overall shell for the Chart 1 apparatus.

nodes.label: outer wireframe
nodes.notes: Thin-line chamber boundary.

nodes.label: word family plane
nodes.notes: Front layer for word-family relations.

nodes.label: technical construction plane
nodes.notes: Middle layer for rule-based construction anchors.

nodes.label: sense boundary plane
nodes.notes: Back layer for the sense split.

nodes.label: skill / making
nodes.notes: Axis label.

nodes.label: contrivance
nodes.notes: Axis label.

nodes.label: not natural
nodes.semantic_role: later contrast point on semantic axis
nodes.notes: Axis label.

nodes.label: fake / affected
nodes.notes: Axis label.

nodes.label: modern shortcut: artificial = fake
nodes.notes: Use only as a working guide label, not final copy.

nodes.label: not natural is not the same as fake
nodes.notes: Important guide for state_sense_boundary_active.

nodes.label: contrivance is not deception only
nodes.notes: Prevents artifice/contrivance from being overread as fraud.
